generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time occupancy data in building zones, integrated with BIM metadata for semantic enrichment and real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System (BAS) sensor measuring indoor temperature, used for environmental monitoring and reinforcement learning-based control optimization in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing humidity levels for indoor environmental quality assessment, integrated with BIM for semantic device metadata."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control systems, used in BOREALIS project's reinforcement learning optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy monitoring sensor capturing real-time consumption data for performance analytics and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemPerformanceMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BAS sensor tracking overall building system performance metrics, used for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream transmitted from IoT sensors to Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from BAS sensors, synchronized with Digital Twin for environmental monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Humidity measurement data transmitted in real-time for indoor environmental quality assessment."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Ambient light level data stream used for adaptive lighting control optimization via reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data for performance analytics and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance SystemPerformanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Building system performance metrics transmitted for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemPerformanceMonitor
]

instance HistoricalOperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Aggregated historical operational data from building systems, used for trend analysis and long-term optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemPerformanceMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically extended BIM model incorporating device metadata (sensor/actuator IDs, control logic) and middleware configurations (Eclipse Hono/Ditto endpoints)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformer, DeviceMetadataExtractor
]

instance DeviceTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated device twin representation from enriched BIM models, containing control policies and visualization assets."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization, ControlPolicyGenerator
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime control policies generated via model-to-text transformations, used for adaptive building automation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningOptimizer
]

instance VisualizationAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets for immersive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time sensor data (occupancy, environmental metrics) for immediate monitoring and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance HistoricalOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series historical data from building systems for predictive analytics and long-term optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HistoricalOperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance SensorConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata extracted from BIM containing sensor/actuator IDs, endpoint addresses, and control logic configurations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviceMetadataExtractor, EclipseDittoIntegration
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BimToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool performing model-to-model and model-to-text transformations to generate runtime artifacts from BIM."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DeviceMetadataExtractor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component extracting sensor/actuator metadata from enriched BIM models for middleware configuration."
    DTDFVocab:enables EclipseHonoIntegration, EclipseDittoIntegration
]

instance EclipseHonoIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT messaging protocol enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical sensors and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataSynchronizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework providing device management, data synchronization, and standardized twin representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceTwinManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment enabling immersive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveMonitoringService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning library implementing adaptive control strategies for lighting optimization (BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingControlService
]

instance ControlPolicyGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component generating runtime control policies from BIM-based device configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing live visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine 5 for facility management."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationInsight, SystemStateInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service identifying performance gaps between design and operation using historical data and reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceGapInsight, OptimizationRecommendation
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control (BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationInsight, EnergyEfficiencyAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication and automated setup of physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight, ActuatorConfigurationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating building system performance for energy efficiency and environmental quality analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing building performance metrics for operational optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight, ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3D interactive monitoring of building operations through Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualMonitoringInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring real-time synchronization between physical sensors and Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSynchronizationInsight
]

instance DeviceTwinManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device twins, including registration, configuration, and lifecycle management."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceTwinInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights including system states, energy consumption, and environmental conditions visualized in Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state of building systems including occupancy, temperature, and lighting levels."
]

instance PerformanceGapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified discrepancies between designed performance and actual operational performance."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generated recommendations for energy-efficient lighting schedules and HVAC adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized lighting control parameters derived from reinforcement learning analysis."
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to lighting systems for maximum energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of automated commissioning process for physical actuators and sensors."
]

instance ActuatorConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration of physical actuators based on virtual twin commands."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from building system simulations showing potential performance improvements."
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive analysis of building performance metrics over time."
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic updates to control policies without full system redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations for facility management."
]

instance DataSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and quality of real-time data synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance DeviceTwinInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state and configuration of device twins in the Digital Twin system."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator adjusting lighting levels based on real-time data and control policies, integrated with BIM for bidirectional communication (TwinLight project)."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator receiving commands from Digital Twin for environmental control optimization."
]

instance BuildingAutomationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central controller managing all building automation systems with real-time input from Digital Twin."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **control signals generated by the DT** and transmitted back to the **Building Control Systems (BCS)** or **actuators** in the physical building. The framework leverages **model-driven transformations** to generate **runtime interfaces** for bidirectional communication, ensuring that decisions made in the DT (e.g., lighting adjustments, energy optimization) are executed in the physical system. **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** facilitate this interaction by providing **standardized protocols** for data exchange, while **Unreal Engine 5** offers an immersive visualization layer for monitoring and manual overrides by facility managers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time** for critical operational interactions (e.g., sensor data acquisition, control signal transmission) and **near-real-time** for analytics and optimization services. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **synchronization fidelity** between the DT and its physical counterpart, ensuring high temporal alignment. The **BOREALIS** project demonstrates **iterative refinement** of control policies over time using **post-occupancy sensor data**, indicating a **dynamic, evolving twinning process** rather than a static snapshot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange and device management.
  3. **Control Layer**: **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **reinforcement learning modules** (BOREALIS) for adaptive operations.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for immersive interaction.
  5. **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for **custom service integration** (e.g., analytics, AI-driven decision support).
  The constellation supports **bidirectional synchronization**, **scalable deployment**, and **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems, adhering to **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by this DT system span from **design and construction** to **operation and refurbishment**, aligning with the **BIM-based life cycle management** paradigm. The DT represents the physical building in three key phases:
  1. **As-designed (ideal)**: Static BIM model with semantic enrichment for runtime aspects.
  2. **As-manufactured**: Integration of **device metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) during commissioning.
  3. **As-operated**: **Real-time synchronization** with live data, enabling **predictive maintenance, adaptive control, and performance optimization**.
  The framework supports **longitudinal twinning**, ensuring compatibility with **existing AECO standards** (e.g., BIM) and **future-proofing** for evolving operational requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment** between the DT and its physical counterpart, assessing **temporal and semantic synchronization**.
  - **Automated validation**: Ensures **semantic consistency** between BIM models and runtime artifacts during deployment.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressed through **real-time sensor data integration** and **adaptive control strategies** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
  - **Error handling**: **Bidirectional communication protocols** (Hono/Ditto) include **reconciliation mechanisms** for data discrepancies.
  - **Verification**: **Case study evaluations** (e.g., Living Lab) demonstrate **operational effectiveness** and **scalability** of the framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, providing standardized APIs and protocols for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the virtual twin. The system generates runtime interfaces to facilitate this interaction, ensuring low-latency synchronization. While specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) are not explicitly detailed, the middleware layer abstracts these concerns, enabling seamless integration with IoT/BAS devices. The focus is on interoperability and scalability, with extension points for custom protocol integrations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **horizontal integration** with external systems is enabled through:
  - **Standardized APIs**: Generated from BIM models for **interoperability** with **ERP, CMMS, or other AECO tools**.
  - **Middleware agnosticism**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** support **protocol-agnostic communication**, allowing integration with **legacy IoT platforms** or **proprietary BCS**.
  - **Data normalization**: Ensures **semantic consistency** across heterogeneous data sources (e.g., sensor feeds, BIM models).
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: **Modular extension points** enable **plug-and-play integration** of third-party services (e.g., weather data, occupancy analytics)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is primarily with the **physical twin (PT) owner** (e.g., building owner or facility manager). The framework adheres to privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR) and supports:
  - **Role-based access control (RBAC)**: For secure data sharing among stakeholders.
  - **Data anonymization**: For sensitive operational data.
  - **Compliance with AECO standards**: For data governance and interoperability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to AECO-specific standards, primarily Building Information Modeling (BIM), which serves as the semantic backbone for asset representation. The framework leverages standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange and interoperability. While specific standards like IFC, COBie, or OASIS AMQP are not explicitly mentioned, the model-driven approach ensures compliance with domain-wide best practices for DT deployment in the construction industry."
]
